hero.title: Art That Speaks Your Language.
hero.description: Hand-finished decorative paintings from our Niamey studio. We blend modern minimalism with rich, organic textures to create unique pieces that turn your house into a home.

vision.text: Lyrabloom was born from a simple belief: your space should inspire you. We combine contemporary design with the raw, earthy textures of Niger to create powerful works that bring character and warmth to any interior.

step1.title: 1. Your Vision, Our Guide
step1.desc: Every piece begins with a conversation. We study your space, light, and color palette to ensure your painting feels like a natural extension of your home.

step2.title: 2. Handcrafted with Intention
step2.desc: In our Niamey atelier, we build layers of textured impasto and natural tones. Our artists focus on the small details that give each piece its premium, bespoke feel.

step3.title: 3. A Space Transformed
step3.desc: The final result is more than art on a wall. It’s an atmosphere—refined, welcoming, and uniquely yours—that transforms the way you experience your space.

gallery.title: Selected Works
gallery.subtitle: Signature Collection
gallery.description: A selection of original creations. Explore the collection by moving your cursor — each movement reveals a new piece.

artworks.desc_piece1: Created during an initiation journey to the north, this canvas tells the story of agricultural lands dried by the sun. Each layer of ochre was meticulously applied by hand to reproduce the natural cracks of the soil, symbolizing the resilience of nature.
artworks.desc_piece2: Inspired by the first morning light in Niamey, this work is an ode to the city's awakening. The warm shades and rough texture capture that suspended moment when the desert wind meets the rising heat, offering a sense of deep calm.
artworks.desc_piece3: An exploration of traditional architectural forms. This painting was born from the observation of mud-brick terraces, sculpted by the elements. The irregular geometry tells the story of manual labor and human construction in harmony with the environment.
artworks.desc_piece4: A tribute to the Niger River. The fluid movements and deep hues of this work were created with broad, continuous gestures, reflecting the peaceful yet powerful current of the water. It is an invitation to contemplation and letting go.
artworks.desc_piece5: This piece honors the natural pigments extracted from our earth. This painting was designed as a celebration of raw matter, where every imperfection of the surface is an integral part of its unique history and character.

impact.title: Art with a heart for our Soil
impact.desc: Lyrabloom is about more than just beauty. Every work you welcome into your home supports local artistic education and helps preserve the traditional craftsmanship of our community in Niamey.
impact.teaser: Every piece supports local initiatives in Niger.

footer.delivery_info: Delivery of custom-made decorative paintings throughout Niger and internationally.

seo.title: Lyrabloom | Hand-painted Art & Interior Decoration in Niger
seo.description: Lyrabloom is a creative studio in Niger specializing in decorative painting. Elevate your interiors with original works, inspired by earth and art.
seo.og_description: Elevate your interiors with contemporary abstract paintings, created in Niamey.
